title: Dhoom
tagline: One brave cop... one smart thief... one cool biker... together they create...  Dhoom
overview: A gang of bikers headed by the cool-headed and arrogant Kabir is on a robbing spree in Mumbai.  ACP Jai Dixit is put in charge of the case and he recruits a bumbling bike mechanic and racer to help Jai nab them.
